name: Italian Sausage Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups shredded Monterey Jack cheese (10 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 15-inch jelly roll pan.
3. Remove casing from sausage in a large skillet. Brown sausage with onion and green pepper over medium heat until vegetables are just tender.
4. Drain excess fat, if any, and stir in mushrooms.
5. In a small saucepan, warm 1/2 cup tomato sauce and water (105-115°F). Reserve the remaining tomato sauce for topping.
6. Dissolve yeast from Hot Roll Mix in the hot tomato sauce and water mixture.
7. Stir in the flour mixture from the Hot Roll Mix; blend well.
8. Press dough onto the prepared pan, forming a rim around the edge.
9. Spread reserved tomato sauce over the dough and sprinkle with cheese.
10. Layer the prepared sausage and vegetable mixture over the cheese.
11. Bake at 425°F for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
12. Makes 6 servings.
13. Per serving: 660 calories, 26 g protein, 53 g carbohydrate, 37 g fat, 1630 mg sodium, 305 mg potassium
14. Pillsbury Quick & Easy Recipe, Classic Cookbook, #10, p. 54
